# Trivy vulnerability ignore list
# =================================
# Format: <CVE-ID> [exp:<YYYY-MM-DD>] [# justification]
#
# Rules:
#   - Each accepted CVE MUST have a justification comment on the same line.
#   - Each accepted CVE MUST have an expiry date (exp:) no more than 90 days out.
#   - The exception MUST be approved via the vulnerability exception process
#     documented in docs/vulnerability-exception-process.md before being added here.
#   - The PR adding this entry must reference the approved exception issue number.
#   - Expired entries are treated as active CVEs and will re-block the build.
#
# Example (do not uncomment without a real approval):
# CVE-2023-XXXXX exp:2025-09-30 # [EXCEPTION-42] No fix available in alpine:3.19; not reachable from app code path; mitigated by network policy
#
# ── Active exceptions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# (none — all CVEs at HIGH/CRITICAL must be fixed or explicitly accepted here)
